description: Configure Firefox to enforce strict tracking protection and create a custom address-bar search keyword for the Python Package Index (PyPI). 1) Navigate to the Firefox Settings (Privacy & Security). 2) Change Enhanced Tracking Protection to 'Strict'. 3) Change 'Send websites a Do Not Track signal' to 'Always'. 4) Navigate to https://pypi.org/. 5) Create a custom search keyword '!pypi' for the PyPI search bar. 6) Use your new keyword in the address bar to search for the 'requests' package (e.g., type '!pypi requests' and press Enter). 7) Bookmark the resulting search page to the Bookmarks Toolbar, naming the bookmark exactly 'PyPI Requests Search'.
